response:
# Cheaper Alternatives to HiBob

## Core HR Platforms (Most Similar)
- **BambooHR** - Good balance of features and cost for small-to-mid companies
- **Gusto** - Strong for payroll + HR, competitive pricing
- **Zenefits** - Lower-cost all-in-one option
- **Namely** - Mid-market focused, sometimes cheaper depending on size
- **Workday** - More expensive at scale, but better for enterprises

## Budget-Friendly Options
- **Square Payroll** - Very affordable if you use Square
- **Rippling** - Competitive pricing, especially for IT management bundling
- **ADP Run** - Simple, less feature-rich but cheaper tier
- **Justworks** - Transparent pricing, good for startups

## Super Budget (Under $10/employee/month)
- **Deputy** - Scheduling & HR basics
- **Factorial** - Streamlined, affordable
- **Workable** (recruitment focused)
- **Wave** - Free basic payroll

## DIY/Spreadsheet Alternatives
- **Airtable** + **Stripe** (custom solutions)
- **Monday.com** (build your own system)
- **Spreadsheets + separate payroll tool**

## Key Considerations
- **Size matters** - pricing varies dramatically by employee count
- **Feature needs** - don't pay for what you won't use
- **Integration requirements** - can affect total cost
- **Support level** - cheaper = often less support

**What size is your company & what features matter most?** That would help narrow recommendations.
